prose.en: Ensure that the facility undergoes {param:pe-13.04_odp.01} fire protection inspections by authorized and qualified inspectors and identified deficiencies are resolved within {param:pe-13.04_odp.02}.

guidance.en: Authorized and qualified personnel within the jurisdiction of the organization include state, county, and city fire inspectors and fire marshals. Organizations provide escorts during inspections in situations where the systems that reside within the facilities contain sensitive information.

prose.en: the facility undergoes fire protection inspections {param:pe-13.04_odp.01} by authorized and qualified inspectors;
the identified deficiencies from fire protection inspections are resolved within {param:pe-13.04_odp.02}.

objects.en: test records of fire suppression and detection devices/systems
Organizational personnel with responsibilities for planning, approving, and executing fire inspections
organizational personnel with information security responsibilities

guidelines.en: the frequency for conducting fire protection inspections on the facility is defined;
a time period for resolving deficiencies identified by fire protection inspections is defined;
